author: Rook (Claude Fable 5, solo-dev session)
purpose: Ordered map rotation + host-pick list for SPLITROOT. UArchonMapRegistryLibrary reads this file at runtime and falls back to C++ literals only if the file is unreadable. The front-end host menu lists these entries; the match loop's Traveling phase advances rotation_order through them. Renegade pattern: ordered server-side rotation, all clients auto-load the next map, no lobby return.
flag_convention: Entries carry url_options (Unreal travel-URL options). Runtime gates accept a flag EITHER from the process command line (-Flag, smoke scripts) OR as a travel-URL option (?Flag, rotation/ServerTravel). See UArchonLaunchFlagLibrary.

maps.notes: Worlds-as-code valley: layout library + block actors + runtime lighting on the empty engine map. Two-team v0 match objectives placed (2 base cores, 3 neutral resource sites).
FPS template map the canary grew up on. Kept in rotation as the second entry so map SWITCHING is testable before a second real map exists. No match objectives — free-roam range.

remix_rule: Future games on the factory branch swap this file and keep the registry library as the substrate reader/fallback. The registry schema, the dual-source flag convention, and the rotation mechanism are SUBSTRATE.
